title: Poll – Who wants a fitness training seminar
excerpt: Mike Fouts, an ESC member, level 1 Edmonton Squash League player and owner of Overhaul Fitness, has kindly offered to run a series of free seminars in late May about fitness, performance and nutrition likely during the day on Saturdays. We think this is a great idea, and hope to have Mike’s company run regular … Read more
content:
Mike Fouts, an ESC member, level 1 Edmonton Squash League player and owner of Overhaul Fitness, has kindly offered to run a series of free seminars in late May about fitness, performance and nutrition likely during the day on Saturdays. We think this is a great idea, and hope to have Mike’s company run regular fitness classes at the club in the near future.

To gauge interest in attending Mike’s seminars, please take the poll below. Let us know if you have any further feedback in the comments.
